notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q MD&A part 1 of 2 (accession 0001104659-23-114808, 2023-11-06); part 2 handled by another bot.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (fiscal_kpis: null).
wage_inflation and restaurant_staffing_levels are two causal variables from the same labor-expense sentence, split per R2.

Used same_store_sales (standard whole phrase) for 'comparable restaurant sales'; company-wide level. North Italia brand-level comps kept as separate brand driver; The Cheesecake Factory brand comps NOT coined separately because the brand name equals the company legal name (banned in names).
